use_cases: Enable users to like/unlike content with smooth animated feedback
Add social engagement indicators to articles, posts, or products
Display real-time like counts with visual confirmation on interaction
Provide satisfying micro-interactions that increase user engagement
Serve as a template for other toggle-based animated UI components
ai_summary: An animated like button component inspired by Vercel's design system, featuring smooth click-triggered animations and gradient styling. The component provides satisfying visual feedback on user interaction with a radial burst animation when liked and revert animation when unliked. Designed for social engagement features in content-heavy applications.
